summary.en: AI research company building thought-to-language models that let people talk to computers via thought alone.
summary.zh: AI 研究公司，打造思緒轉語言模型，讓人們僅憑思緒就能與電腦溝通。

highlight.en: Its flagship MindSpeech is described as the first supervised AI model to translate imagined speech into text, focusing on software models rather than hardware.
highlight.zh: 其旗艦產品 MindSpeech 號稱是首個將想像中的語音翻譯成文字的監督式 AI 模型，專注於軟體模型而非硬體。

summary.en: Kilobaser makes a desktop DNA printer — the Nespresso machine for DNA — for synthesizing DNA at the bench.
summary.zh: Kilobaser 打造桌上型 DNA 列印機（DNA 界的 Nespresso 機），讓科學家能在自己的實驗桌上合成 DNA。

highlight.en: By combining microfluidic chip technology with a reagent cartridge, it created the first personal DNA synthesizer, ending reliance on outsourced synthesis.
highlight.zh: 透過結合微流體晶片技術與試劑匣，它打造出首台個人 DNA 合成器，終結對外包合成的依賴。

summary.en: PipeBio is a SaaS bioinformatics cloud platform for antibody and peptide screening and drug development.
summary.zh: PipeBio 是一個用於抗體與胜肽篩選及藥物開發的 SaaS 生物資訊雲端平台。

highlight.en: It lets scientists analyze massive DNA sequencing datasets themselves — overlaying assay, sequence and process data — without needing bioinformaticians.
highlight.zh: 它讓科學家無需生物資訊專家或程式設計師，即可自行分析海量 DNA 定序資料，並疊合檢測、序列與流程資料。

summary.en: Journey is a no-code storytelling platform that helps sales teams tell better stories and win more deals.
summary.zh: Journey 是一個無程式碼說故事平台，協助銷售團隊講出更好的故事、贏得更多交易。

highlight.en: It combines varied content into one interactive experience, arguing the future of storytelling looks more like a video game than a slideshow.
highlight.zh: 它將各式內容整合成單一互動體驗，主張說故事的未來更像電玩遊戲，而非投影片簡報。

summary.en: Krab is a lending platform offering instant loans to Indian trucking firms that lack a formal credit score.
summary.zh: Krab 是一個借貸平台，為印度沒有正式信用評分的貨運公司提供即時貸款。

highlight.en: It builds a credit profile from 200+ data points via consent APIs to offer bank loans in under 60 seconds, plus order, invoice and payment tools.
highlight.zh: 它透過授權 API 從 200 多個資料點建立信用檔案，可在 60 秒內提供銀行貸款，並附帶訂單、發票與付款工具。

summary.en: CoVerified built software using COVID-19 test, vaccine and symptom data to help organizations reopen safely.
summary.zh: CoVerified 打造軟體，運用 COVID-19 檢測、疫苗與症狀資料，協助組織安全重啟運作。

highlight.en: Its integrated platform verified real-time compliance by combining test results, vaccine records and symptom data for safe reopening.
highlight.zh: 其整合平台結合檢測結果、疫苗紀錄與症狀資料，即時驗證合規狀態以利安全重啟。

summary.en: Prequel helps B2B companies sync and share data directly to their customers' data warehouses.
summary.zh: Prequel 協助 B2B 公司將資料直接同步並分享至客戶的資料倉儲。

highlight.en: It exports data on an ongoing basis into customers' Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery, Databricks or other warehouses, making data sharing easy.
highlight.zh: 它持續將資料匯出至客戶的 Snowflake、Redshift、BigQuery、Databricks 等倉儲，讓資料分享變得輕鬆。

summary.en: YourQuote is a social writing app and one of India's largest platforms for short-form creative writing.
summary.zh: YourQuote 是一個社交寫作 App，也是印度最大的短篇創意寫作平台之一。

highlight.en: Much as Instagram turned everyone into a photographer, YourQuote turned 2.5 million people in India into amateur writers.
highlight.zh: 如同 Instagram 讓人人成為攝影師，YourQuote 讓印度 250 萬人成為業餘寫作者。

summary.en: Emerge Tools is a suite of developer tools that helps teams build and optimize their mobile apps.
summary.zh: Emerge Tools 是一套開發者工具，協助團隊打造並優化行動應用程式。

highlight.en: Its tooling is already used by leading mobile teams including DoorDash, Square, Airbnb, Duolingo and Stripe.
highlight.zh: 其工具已被 DoorDash、Square、Airbnb、Duolingo 與 Stripe 等頂尖行動團隊採用。

summary.en: Text Blaze lets users insert smart text templates anywhere on the web via keyboard shortcuts.
summary.zh: Text Blaze 讓使用者透過鍵盤快捷鍵在網頁任何地方插入智慧文字範本，自動化重複輸入。

highlight.en: Templates can include placeholders, logic, dynamic fields and integrations with other apps, saving time and improving communication quality.
highlight.zh: 範本可包含預留位置、邏輯、動態欄位與其他應用程式的整合，節省時間並提升溝通品質。

summary.en: Swadesi Way is an organic food brand in India sourcing exclusively from small-farmer collectives.
summary.zh: Swadesi Way 是印度的有機食品品牌，只向小農合作社採購。

highlight.en: It operates with capped margins — 60% to farmers, 30% to ops, 10% overhead — and radical transparency on pricing and farmer earnings.
highlight.zh: 它以上限利潤運作——60% 給農民、30% 給營運、10% 給管銷——並對定價與農民收入保持徹底透明。

summary.en: JoinSub was an aggregator and provider of subscription programs for local businesses in India.
summary.zh: JoinSub 是印度本地商家訂閱方案的整合者與提供者。

highlight.en: It helped India's 14M+ retail outlets — from F&B to salons, gyms and bakeries — drive repeat purchases through subscription models.
highlight.zh: 它協助印度逾 1,400 萬家零售門市（從餐飲到沙龍、健身房與烘焙坊）透過訂閱模式帶動重複消費。

summary.en: Fountain9 is a predictive inventory planning tool helping food brands and retailers cut waste and stockouts.
summary.zh: Fountain9 是預測性庫存規劃工具，協助食品品牌與零售商減少浪費與缺貨。

highlight.en: Its demand-sensing and pricing engine factors in sales trends, seasonality, holidays and markdowns to forecast inventory and optimize prices.
highlight.zh: 其需求感測與定價引擎將銷售趨勢、季節性、節日與降價納入考量，以預測庫存並優化價格。

summary.en: Pesto is a fintech startup from YC's Winter 2021 batch.
summary.zh: Pesto 是來自 YC 2021 冬季梯次的金融科技新創公司。

highlight.en: A Winter 2021 fintech company; further details are not available in the provided source material.
highlight.zh: 一家 2021 冬季梯次的金融科技公司；提供的原始資料中未有更多細節。

summary.en: Axiom.ai is a no-code browser RPA tool that automates repetitive work by recording clicks and typing.
summary.zh: Axiom.ai 是一個無程式碼的瀏覽器 RPA 工具，透過記錄點擊與輸入動作來自動化重複性工作。

highlight.en: Aiming to be the industry-standard browser RPA tool, it now ranks alongside Selenium as a top Google result for 'Browser Automation'.
highlight.zh: 志在成為瀏覽器 RPA 的業界標準，它現已與 Selenium 並列「瀏覽器自動化」的 Google 搜尋頂端結果。

summary.en: Segments.ai helps build better computer vision models by helping teams label multi-sensor data.
summary.zh: Segments.ai 協助團隊標註多感測器資料，從而打造更好的電腦視覺模型。

highlight.en: Robotics and automotive customers use it to efficiently annotate point cloud and image data for autonomous drones, delivery robots and self-driving cars.
highlight.zh: 機器人與汽車客戶用它高效標註點雲與影像資料，用於自主無人機、配送機器人與自駕車。

summary.en: PingPong is a video messaging app for remote teams — like Slack, but for video.
summary.zh: PingPong 是一款給遠端團隊用的視訊訊息 App——像 Slack，但用於視訊。

highlight.en: Teams across multiple time zones collaborate by exchanging short video, voice and screen-recording clips instead of live meetings.
highlight.zh: 跨時區團隊透過交換短片、語音與螢幕錄製片段來協作，取代即時會議。

summary.en: Avenue is an observability platform that lets operations teams set up alerts from their database or warehouse.
summary.zh: Avenue 是一個可觀測性平台，讓營運團隊能從資料庫或資料倉儲設定警報。

highlight.en: Like Datadog or PagerDuty for ops teams, it can improve response times to critical problems from several days to real-time.
highlight.zh: 像是給營運團隊用的 Datadog 或 PagerDuty，它能將關鍵問題的反應時間從數天縮短至即時。

summary.en: Quadrant Health analyzes EHR and messaging data to predict disease before it occurs.
summary.zh: Quadrant Health 分析電子病歷與訊息資料，在疾病發生前進行預測。

highlight.en: A healthcare company applying analysis of electronic health records and messaging data to forecast disease earlier.
highlight.zh: 一家醫療保健公司，運用電子病歷與訊息資料的分析來更早預測疾病。

summary.en: SST builds open-source developer tools and frameworks 'for whatever you build.'
summary.zh: SST 打造開源開發者工具與框架，「為你所建造的一切而生」。

highlight.en: It is the maker of widely used open projects including sst.dev, opencode.ai, opennext.js.org, openauth.js.org and models.dev.
highlight.zh: 它是 sst.dev、opencode.ai、opennext.js.org、openauth.js.org 與 models.dev 等多個廣受使用的開源專案的開發者。

summary.en: unSurvey runs AI-led market research interviews with no scheduling and instant insights.
summary.zh: unSurvey 進行由 AI 主導的市場研究訪談，無需安排時間並即時產出洞察。

highlight.en: It replaces scheduled human interviews with AI-led conversations that deliver market research insights instantly.
highlight.zh: 它以 AI 主導的對話取代需排程的真人訪談，即時交付市場研究洞察。

summary.en: BotBuilt uses robots to build houses, creating flexible robotic systems to address the housing crisis.
summary.zh: BotBuilt 用機器人蓋房子，打造彈性的機器人系統以因應住房危機。

highlight.en: Its software and cost-efficient hardware target the $600B residential construction industry's labor shortage using AI and computer vision.
highlight.zh: 其軟體與低成本硬體運用 AI 與電腦視覺，瞄準 6,000 億美元住宅營造產業的勞動力短缺。

summary.en: Biodock is a cloud AI platform that automates microscopy image analysis for scientists.
summary.zh: Biodock 是一個雲端 AI 平台，為科學家自動化顯微鏡影像分析。

highlight.en: Its end-to-end AI architecture compresses months of microscopy analysis to minutes, with auto-scaling storage, GPU compute and more accurate results.
highlight.zh: 其端對端 AI 架構將數月的顯微鏡分析壓縮至數分鐘，並提供自動擴展儲存、GPU 運算與更準確的結果。

summary.en: Rejoy Health is an AI-powered healthcare information platform that uses LLMs to deliver medical knowledge.
summary.zh: Rejoy Health 是一個 AI 驅動的醫療資訊平台，運用大型語言模型提供醫學知識。

highlight.en: It leverages large language models to deliver accurate, up-to-date medical knowledge to users.
highlight.zh: 它運用大型語言模型，為使用者提供準確、最新的醫學知識。

summary.en: Mezli built autonomous shipping-container restaurants serving affordable takeout and delivery meals.
summary.zh: Mezli 打造自主運作的貨櫃餐廳，提供平價的外帶與外送餐點。

highlight.en: Founded by three Stanford students, its fully autonomous 'auto-kitchens' aimed to democratize access to healthy, convenient food.
highlight.zh: 由三名史丹佛學生創立，其全自主的「自動廚房」旨在讓人人都能取得健康、便利的食物。

summary.en: Routine is an AI-native, all-in-one workspace that helps startups manage work and life in a single app.
summary.zh: Routine 是一個 AI 原生的一站式工作空間，協助新創在單一 App 中管理工作與生活。

highlight.en: It centralizes tasks, meetings and tickets from tools like GitHub, Salesforce and Slack into a graph-based, local-first unified workspace.
highlight.zh: 它將 GitHub、Salesforce 與 Slack 等工具的任務、會議與工單，整合到一個基於圖形、本地優先的統一工作空間。

summary.en: Bloom is an investing app that teaches users how to invest and build long-term wealth.
summary.zh: Bloom 是一款投資 App，教導使用者如何投資並建立長期財富。

highlight.en: It pairs interactive financial lessons and gamified rewards with a long-term investing account; per its text, over 1M users joined and it crossed $3MM ARR.
highlight.zh: 它將互動式理財課程與遊戲化獎勵機制，搭配長期投資帳戶；據其文案，已有逾 100 萬名使用者加入，年經常性收入突破 300 萬美元。

summary.en: Kanda is 'Affirm for general contractors,' letting them offer financing to homeowners for remodels.
summary.zh: Kanda 是「給承包商用的 Affirm」，讓承包商能為想裝修的屋主提供分期融資。

highlight.en: It enables contractors to offer financing to homeowners who want to remodel but cannot pay the full price upfront.
highlight.zh: 它讓承包商能為想裝修但無法一次付清全額的屋主提供融資。

summary.en: Flux is a cross-border payments app letting merchants and users send and accept payments in crypto or fiat.
summary.zh: Flux 是一個跨境支付 App，讓商家與使用者能以加密貨幣或法幣收付款項。

highlight.en: Using just a phone number, its wallet lets African merchants receive crypto or fiat payments globally without exchanges or expensive fees.
highlight.zh: 僅憑電話號碼，其錢包就能讓非洲商家在全球收取加密貨幣或法幣付款，無需透過交易所或支付高額手續費。

summary.en: Degrees of Freedom offered an affordable higher-education alternative blending virtual and traditional models.
summary.zh: Degrees of Freedom 提供高品質、平價的高等教育替代方案，融合虛擬與傳統模式。

highlight.en: Students learned on-campus, online and in-VR from Ivy League professors and master teachers, all at the cost of the Pell Grant.
highlight.zh: 學生在校園、線上與 VR 中向常春藤教授與名師學習，費用僅相當於 Pell Grant 助學金。

summary.en: Gradia Health provides integrated, high-touch healthcare at scale through software for clinics.
summary.zh: Gradia Health 透過診所軟體，大規模提供整合、高互動的醫療照護。

highlight.en: Its software keeps patients informed, eases provider communication and gives access to a virtual care team while helping clinics earn more.
highlight.zh: 其軟體讓病患掌握資訊、便於與醫療人員溝通並接觸虛擬照護團隊，同時協助診所增加收入。

summary.en: Noya radically reduced the capital costs and build time for direct air capture of CO2.
summary.zh: Noya 大幅降低二氧化碳直接空氣捕集的資本成本與建置時間。

highlight.en: It retrofitted existing industrial equipment like cooling towers, turning them into CO2 capture machines.
highlight.zh: 它改造冷卻塔等既有工業設備，將其轉變為二氧化碳捕集機器。

summary.en: Pry Financials makes it simple for founders to manage budgets, hiring plans, financial models and cash runway.
summary.zh: Pry Financials 讓創辦人能輕鬆管理預算、招聘計畫、財務模型與現金跑道。

highlight.en: It replaces buggy, time-consuming Excel-based planning that most businesses only do once a quarter.
highlight.zh: 它取代多數企業每季才做一次、且容易出錯又費時的 Excel 規劃流程。

summary.en: Orbillion Bio makes tasty, scalable cultivated meat at price parity using computational bioprocess models.
summary.zh: Orbillion Bio 運用運算化生物製程模型，製造美味、可規模化且具價格競爭力的培養肉。

highlight.en: Its proprietary bioware controls the cell microenvironment without GMO, serum or growth factors, targeting $4/kg cost at commercial scale.
highlight.zh: 其專有生物技術無需基改、血清或生長因子即可控制細胞微環境，目標在商業規模下達到每公斤 4 美元的成本。

summary.en: Compose.ai is a free Chrome extension that uses AI-powered autocomplete to cut writing time by up to 40%.
summary.zh: Compose.ai 是一個免費的 Chrome 擴充功能，運用 AI 自動完成功能，將寫作時間最多縮短 40%。

highlight.en: Like Gmail's email autocomplete but available everywhere — similar to how Grammarly works across the web.
highlight.zh: 像是 Gmail 的郵件自動完成，但隨處可用——類似 Grammarly 在整個網路上的運作方式。

summary.en: FlowEQ is a no-code workflow automation tool for complex, high-volume processes that need human judgment.
summary.zh: FlowEQ 是一個無程式碼工作流自動化工具，適用於需要人為判斷的複雜、高量流程。

highlight.en: Its interactive decision trees help support, operations and product teams get through high-stakes recurring workflows up to 10x faster.
highlight.zh: 其互動式決策樹協助客服、營運與產品團隊，將高風險的重複性工作流程加速最多 10 倍。

summary.en: Arpio is a SaaS that eliminates AWS application downtime, recovering from any outage in 10 minutes or less.
summary.zh: Arpio 是一個 SaaS，消除 AWS 應用程式的停機時間，能在 10 分鐘內從任何中斷中復原。

highlight.en: It makes it easy to recover AWS applications from any outage in just a few minutes, eliminating downtime.
highlight.zh: 它讓 AWS 應用程式能在短短幾分鐘內從任何中斷中復原，消除停機時間。

summary.en: Webiny is an open-source framework giving developers everything they need to build serverless applications.
summary.zh: Webiny 是一個開源框架，提供開發者打造無伺服器應用程式所需的一切。

highlight.en: It addresses the shift to serverless — which is not backward compatible — by supplying the new tools developers need to build and rewrite apps.
highlight.zh: 它因應向無伺服器的轉變（此架構並不向後相容），提供開發者打造與重寫應用程式所需的新工具。

summary.en: Gonddo was a B2B wholesale marketplace for independent retailers in Brazil to buy and manage inventory.
summary.zh: Gonddo 曾是一個 B2B 批發市集，供巴西的獨立零售商採購與管理庫存。

highlight.en: It digitalized inventory purchases and modernized distribution and trade credit for SMBs in Brazil, connecting retailers with wholesalers.
highlight.zh: 它數位化庫存採購，為巴西中小企業現代化配送與賒銷信用，並將零售商與批發商連結起來。

summary.en: Bristle offers at-home oral health testing, coaching and care.
summary.zh: Bristle 提供在家進行的口腔健康檢測、指導與照護。

highlight.en: A healthcare company bringing oral health testing, coaching and care into the home setting.
highlight.zh: 一家醫療保健公司，將口腔健康檢測、指導與照護帶入居家場景。

summary.en: Finary was 'Discord for investing,' making investing social by bringing together portfolios and friends.
summary.zh: Finary 曾是「投資界的 Discord」，透過匯集投資組合與好友讓投資變得社交化。

highlight.en: It let users chat, hang out and collaborate on investments alongside their friends in one social space.
highlight.zh: 它讓使用者能在同一個社交空間中與好友聊天、相聚並共同協作投資。

summary.en: Version Story is 'GitHub for lawyers,' bringing visual version control and redlining to legal documents.
summary.zh: Version Story 是「律師界的 GitHub」，為法律文件帶來視覺化的版本控制與紅線標註。

highlight.en: Inspired by GitHub, it tackles the risky process of managing legal document versions, freeing lawyers from file management.
highlight.zh: 受 GitHub 啟發，它解決管理法律文件版本的風險流程，讓律師擺脫檔案管理的負擔。

summary.en: June was a plug-and-play product analytics tool built for B2B SaaS companies.
summary.zh: June 曾是一個即插即用的產品分析工具，專為 B2B SaaS 公司打造。

highlight.en: It automatically generated graphs of the metrics teams should track and let them view and zoom into company-level metrics.
highlight.zh: 它自動產生團隊應追蹤指標的圖表，並讓使用者查看與深入瀏覽公司層級的指標。

summary.en: LogisticsOS offers route optimization and fleet dispatching algorithms for same-day and next-hour delivery.
summary.zh: LogisticsOS 提供路線優化與車隊調度演算法，支援當日與下一小時配送。

highlight.en: It claims to be the route optimization engine FedEx and USPS use in production, raising profit per delivery 15% with 30x faster algorithms.
highlight.zh: 它聲稱是 FedEx 與 USPS 在正式環境使用的路線優化引擎，以快 30 倍的演算法將每次配送利潤提升 15%。

summary.en: Aerotime was a modern calendar designed to kill time fragmentation through goal setting and time blocking.
summary.zh: Aerotime 曾是一款現代行事曆，透過目標設定與時間區塊化來消除時間碎片化。

highlight.en: It helped people set weekly goals, break them into tasks and meetings, and reduce fragmentation from randomly placed meetings and Slack pings.
highlight.zh: 它協助人們設定每週目標、拆解成任務與會議，並減少隨意安排的會議與 Slack 訊息造成的碎片化。

summary.en: Worksphere helps companies manage a hybrid workplace where employees split time between office and home.
summary.zh: Worksphere 協助企業管理混合辦公模式，讓員工在辦公室與居家之間分配工作時間。

highlight.en: Employees can reserve a desk, see who will be in the office and coordinate meetings, letting companies cut unused office space and save money.
highlight.zh: 員工可預訂座位、得知誰會進辦公室並協調會議，讓企業裁減閒置辦公空間並省下成本。

summary.en: Haystack is a delivery analytics platform for software teams that plugs into tools like GitHub.
summary.zh: Haystack 是一個給軟體團隊用的交付分析平台，可串接 GitHub 等工具。

highlight.en: It surfaces insights on delivery speed, bottlenecks and risks affecting velocity, and is trusted by teams at Microsoft, The Economist and Indiegogo.
highlight.zh: 它揭露影響開發速度的交付速度、瓶頸與風險洞察，並獲 Microsoft、The Economist 與 Indiegogo 等團隊信賴。

summary.en: Cheqout was a mobile POS for brick-and-mortar businesses to take orders and accept payments.
summary.zh: Cheqout 曾是一個給實體商家用的行動 POS，可接受點餐與付款。

highlight.en: A hybrid of the Apple Store and WeChat Pay, both staff and customers used their own devices to complete transactions via QR codes.
highlight.zh: 結合 Apple Store 與微信支付的特色，店員與顧客都用自己的裝置透過 QR code 完成交易。

summary.en: Serna Bio develops small molecules that modulate RNA function to enable genetic medicine.
summary.zh: Serna Bio 開發調控 RNA 功能的小分子，以實現基因醫學。

highlight.en: By modulating RNA function with small molecules, it aims to treat diseases driven by biology intractable to other modalities.
highlight.zh: 透過以小分子調控 RNA 功能，它旨在治療其他療法難以處理的生物機制所驅動的疾病。

summary.en: Playmaker was a community and social infrastructure layer for fantasy sports players.
summary.zh: Playmaker 曾是一個給夢幻運動玩家的社群與社交基礎設施層。

highlight.en: It gave fantasy sports players a central place to own their identity and watch live sports alongside friends for more enjoyment.
highlight.zh: 它讓夢幻運動玩家有一個中心化空間來建立身份認同，並與好友一同觀看直播賽事，獲得更多樂趣。

summary.en: SBX Robotics generated synthetic training data to teach robots to see using simulation software.
summary.zh: SBX Robotics 運用模擬軟體產生合成訓練資料，教導機器人「看見」。

highlight.en: Clients sent 25 camera images and received 25,000 perfectly labeled synthetic images — 10x faster and cheaper than annotation services.
highlight.zh: 客戶傳送 25 張相機影像，就能收到 25,000 張完美標註的合成影像——比標註服務快 10 倍且更便宜。

summary.en: Furmacy is digital e-prescribing software for veterinarians.
summary.zh: Furmacy 是給獸醫使用的數位電子處方軟體。

highlight.en: A healthcare company providing e-prescribing software tailored to the needs of veterinarians.
highlight.zh: 一家醫療保健公司，提供專為獸醫需求量身打造的電子處方軟體。

summary.en: Clay was 'Figma for 3D design,' building software that lets anyone create in 3D together.
summary.zh: Clay 曾是「3D 設計界的 Figma」，打造讓任何人都能一起進行 3D 創作的軟體。

highlight.en: It believed collaborating in 3D should feel magical and built software to let people anywhere create in 3D together.
highlight.zh: 它相信 3D 協作應該帶來魔法般的體驗，並打造軟體讓世界各地的人能一起進行 3D 創作。

summary.en: ClipDrop is an app that turns regular mobile photos into professional product visuals using machine learning.
summary.zh: ClipDrop 是一款運用機器學習，將一般手機照片轉換成專業產品視覺的 App。

highlight.en: It targets the 25M+ sellers on platforms like Poshmark, Etsy and eBay who need great visuals but lack a photographer or design team.
highlight.zh: 它瞄準 Poshmark、Etsy 與 eBay 等平台上逾 2,500 萬名需要精美視覺、卻沒有攝影師或設計團隊的賣家。

summary.en: Flok offers end-to-end company retreat planning combining a dashboard with human retreat designers.
summary.zh: Flok 提供端對端的公司員工旅遊規劃，結合儀表板與真人旅遊設計師。

highlight.en: From booking hotel room blocks to planning and executing the ideal itinerary, Flok handles the full retreat experience.
highlight.zh: 從預訂飯店團體房到規劃並執行理想行程，Flok 包辦整個員工旅遊體驗。

summary.en: HyperGlue provides business intelligence on text, giving teams machine intelligence on large text datasets.
summary.zh: HyperGlue 提供文字商業智慧，讓團隊對大型文字資料集獲得機器智慧。

highlight.en: It lets operators, PMs and analysts find the signal in thousands of feedback responses without the engineering or headcount of deploying NLP.
highlight.zh: 它讓營運人員、產品經理與分析師能從數千則回饋中找出訊號，無需投入部署自然語言 AI 所需的工程或人力。

summary.en: Nirva is the lifestyle medicine layer for clinicians, enabling daily care between appointments.
summary.zh: Nirva 是給臨床醫師的生活型態醫學層，讓醫師能在門診之間提供每日照護。

highlight.en: Per its text, 87% of patients improve in weeks, and its system surfaces insights like which foods trigger hot flashes that prior research missed.
highlight.zh: 據其文案，87% 的病患在數週內改善，且其系統能發掘如哪些食物會誘發熱潮紅等過往研究未曾發現的洞察。

summary.en: Hermes Robotics offers autonomous street sweeping as a service by retrofitting existing vehicles.
summary.zh: Hermes Robotics 透過改造既有車輛，提供自主街道清掃即服務。

highlight.en: An industrials company delivering autonomous street sweeping by retro-fitting existing vehicles rather than building new ones.
highlight.zh: 一家工業公司，透過改造既有車輛而非打造新車，提供自主街道清掃服務。

summary.en: Simplify builds AI-enabled infrastructure to power hiring and help people find and land career opportunities.
summary.zh: Simplify 打造 AI 賦能的基礎設施來支援招聘，協助人們發掘並把握職涯機會。

highlight.en: Its flagship Copilot has helped over 1M+ job seekers apply to over 100M jobs, built by a tight-knit team of just 7 people.
highlight.zh: 其旗艦產品 Copilot 已協助逾 100 萬名求職者投遞超過 1 億個職缺，而團隊僅有 7 名成員。

summary.en: Venu AI helps companies meet qualified leads in person by automating conference production.
summary.zh: Venu AI 透過自動化會議籌辦，協助企業與合格潛在客戶面對面會面。

highlight.en: Its automation lets a company host a conference and meet 100 qualified sales leads in person every three months, fully automated.
highlight.zh: 其自動化讓企業每三個月就能舉辦一場會議、面對面接觸 100 位合格的銷售潛在客戶，全程自動化。

summary.en: Pyroscope is open-source continuous profiling software for debugging performance issues.
summary.zh: Pyroscope 是用於除錯效能問題的開源持續性效能剖析軟體。

highlight.en: With just a few lines of code, its continuous profiling platform helps developers debug performance issues and find bottlenecks.
highlight.zh: 只需幾行程式碼，其持續性剖析平台就能協助開發者除錯效能問題並找出瓶頸。

summary.en: Mendel provides workflows that empower employees to spend while finance teams stay in control.
summary.zh: Mendel 提供工作流程，賦能員工自主支出，同時讓財務團隊維持掌控。

highlight.en: A Latin American fintech building spend-management workflows that balance employee autonomy with finance-team control.
highlight.zh: 一家拉丁美洲金融科技公司，打造支出管理工作流程，在員工自主與財務團隊掌控之間取得平衡。

summary.en: Prendea offered live afterschool classes for Spanish-speaking kids ages 4 to 15.
summary.zh: Prendea 為 4 至 15 歲的西語兒童提供即時的課後線上課程。

highlight.en: For a fixed monthly price, kids could pick from a wide selection ranging from TikTok choreography to astronomy.
highlight.zh: 以固定月費，孩子可從 TikTok 舞蹈到天文學等豐富選擇中任意挑選課程。

summary.en: Kitemaker is a faster, more collaborative alternative to Jira optimized for remote teams.
summary.zh: Kitemaker 是 Jira 的替代方案，速度更快、更注重協作，並為遠端團隊優化。

highlight.en: It collects activities and discussions across tools so software teams spend less time coordinating and more time building what users want.
highlight.zh: 它跨工具彙整活動與討論，讓軟體團隊減少協調時間，把更多心力放在打造使用者想要的東西上。

summary.en: Alpas is software that helps procurement departments find suppliers 10x faster using machine learning.
summary.zh: Alpas 是運用機器學習的軟體，協助採購部門以快 10 倍的速度找到供應商。

highlight.en: It gives mid and large-cap manufacturers 360° views of suppliers and supply chains, benchmarking them globally and assessing geopolitical risks.
highlight.zh: 它為中大型製造商提供供應商與供應鏈的 360 度視圖，進行全球比較並評估地緣政治風險。

summary.en: Broad offers a multicurrency account and card for Brazilians, building global financial products.
summary.zh: Broad 為巴西人提供多幣別帳戶與卡片，打造全球化的金融產品。

highlight.en: A fintech building global financial products that enable life without borders for Brazilians.
highlight.zh: 一家金融科技公司，打造讓巴西人實現無國界生活的全球金融產品。

summary.en: Blink provided same-day delivery for e-commerce companies in Europe.
summary.zh: Blink 為歐洲的電商公司提供當日配送服務。

highlight.en: It picked up orders from physical or dark stores, using crowdsourced riders on real-time optimized routes that consumers could track and personalize.
highlight.zh: 它從實體或暗倉取件，運用群眾外包騎手依即時優化路線配送，消費者可追蹤並客製化配送。

summary.en: Forcyte Biotechnologies discovers drugs that control how much cells 'squeeze' to treat mechanical diseases.
summary.zh: Forcyte Biotechnologies 發掘控制細胞「擠壓」程度的藥物，以治療機械性疾病。

highlight.en: Its patented bioMEMS technology turns cell strength into a quantifiable metric to map the 'contractome' and target asthma, fibrosis and more.
highlight.zh: 其專利 bioMEMS 技術將細胞強度轉化為可量化指標，繪製「收縮體」圖譜，鎖定氣喘、纖維化等疾病。

summary.en: Camlist is a super app for pets — a video-first, mobile-only social platform for breeders and pet parents.
summary.zh: Camlist 是寵物超級 App——一個影片優先、僅限行動裝置的社交平台，服務繁殖者與寵物飼主。

highlight.en: It lets pet breeders and pet parents interact, transact and care for their furry friends all under one roof.
highlight.zh: 它讓寵物繁殖者與飼主能在同一平台上互動、交易並照顧毛孩。

summary.en: eqtble is a people analytics platform that turns HR data into actionable insights.
summary.zh: eqtble 是一個人才分析平台，將人力資源資料轉化為可行動的洞察。

highlight.en: Its tech-first people analytics gives talent leaders insight from existing data, with customers including Etsy, Chobani, Nuro and Checkr.
highlight.zh: 其技術導向的人才分析讓人才主管從既有資料中獲得洞察，客戶包括 Etsy、Chobani、Nuro 與 Checkr。

summary.en: Lovd was an NYC service for buying and selling pre-owned goods with 24-hour pickup and delivery.
summary.zh: Lovd 曾是紐約市的二手商品買賣服務，提供 24 小時取件與配送。

highlight.en: With the tagline 'It's not used, it's Lovd,' it picked up and delivered pre-owned goods within 24 hours, only in NYC.
highlight.zh: 以「不是二手，是被愛過」為標語，它在 24 小時內取件並配送二手商品，僅限紐約市。

summary.en: Quadrant Eye was developing the world's first fully online eye exam to improve eyecare access.
summary.zh: Quadrant Eye 曾在開發全球首個完全線上的眼科檢查，以改善眼科照護的可及性。

highlight.en: Built by surgeons, scientists and hackers, it aimed to fight preventable blindness with patentable deep tech in the $137B eye health market.
highlight.zh: 由外科醫師、科學家與駭客打造，它志在以可申請專利的深科技對抗可預防的失明，瞄準 1,370 億美元的眼科健康市場。

summary.en: Taloflow makes tech vendor research better and faster, taking the pain out of technology selection.
summary.zh: Taloflow 讓技術供應商研究更好、更快，消除技術選型的痛苦。

highlight.en: It aims to make tool selection effortless and low-risk for IT and software teams, replacing endless demos and spreadsheets.
highlight.zh: 它旨在讓 IT 與軟體團隊的工具選型變得輕鬆且低風險，取代沒完沒了的產品展示與試算表。

summary.en: Stacksi automates answers to enterprise security questionnaires so companies can close deals faster.
summary.zh: Stacksi 自動化回答企業資安問卷，讓公司能更快成交。

highlight.en: It parses uploaded documents, identifies gaps versus standards and helps companies pass security audits while freeing up top engineers.
highlight.zh: 它解析上傳的文件、找出與標準的落差，協助公司通過資安稽核，同時釋放頂尖工程師的時間。

summary.en: Pensil is a new-age white-label community platform offering SDKs and APIs.
summary.zh: Pensil 是新世代的白標社群平台，提供 SDK 與 API。

highlight.en: A B2B company providing white-label community platform SDKs and APIs for products such as games.
highlight.zh: 一家 B2B 公司，為遊戲等產品提供白標社群平台的 SDK 與 API。

summary.en: Avocado is an AI-native restaurant point-of-sale system with a built-in AI agent.
summary.zh: Avocado 是一個 AI 原生的餐廳銷售點系統，內建 AI 代理。

highlight.en: It combines order management, KDS, kiosks and online ordering in one platform, letting restaurants change menus or check sales with voice or text commands.
highlight.zh: 它將訂單管理、廚房顯示系統、自助點餐機與線上點餐整合於一個平台，讓餐廳能用語音或文字指令更改菜單或查看銷售。

summary.en: CashBook is 'Ramp for Indian businesses,' issuing UPI wallets for employee expenses.
summary.zh: CashBook 是「印度企業版的 Ramp」，為員工支出發放 UPI 錢包。

highlight.en: It issues UPI wallets to employees so businesses can track and control their spending.
highlight.zh: 它向員工發放 UPI 錢包，讓企業能追蹤並控管員工支出。

summary.en: FifthTry is a Notion-like documentation tool that uses Continuous Documentation to end documentation rot.
summary.zh: FifthTry 是類似 Notion 的文件工具，運用「持續性文件」來終結文件腐化。

highlight.en: It integrates with GitHub and blocks code changes from deploying until the related documentation has been updated and approved.
highlight.zh: 它整合 GitHub，並在相關文件更新並核可前，阻擋程式碼變更被部署。

summary.en: Lalabox was a live-stream shopping platform for beauty products.
summary.zh: Lalabox 曾是一個美妝產品的直播購物平台。

highlight.en: A consumer company focused on live-stream shopping specifically for beauty products.
highlight.zh: 一家消費性公司，專注於美妝產品的直播購物。

summary.en: Procoto offers self-service RFP management, simplifying running RFPs, tracking contracts and managing vendors.
summary.zh: Procoto 提供自助式 RFP 管理，讓執行招標、追蹤合約與管理供應商變得簡單。

highlight.en: It gets procurement teams out of dense systems and spreadsheets without paying for heavyweight tools like SAP or Coupa.
highlight.zh: 它讓採購團隊擺脫繁雜的系統與試算表，無需為 SAP 或 Coupa 等重量級工具付費。

summary.en: Outpaint.com builds AI that expands any video to fit any screen without reshoots.
summary.zh: Outpaint.com 打造 AI，將任何影片擴展以適配任何螢幕，無需重新拍攝。

highlight.en: Its AI models convert any video to fit any screen, removing the need for reshoots to reformat content.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 模型將任何影片轉換以適配任何螢幕，免除為重新編排內容而重拍的需要。

summary.en: FirstSupport.ai is an AI assistant for customer support that helps agents reply faster, available on Zendesk.
summary.zh: FirstSupport.ai 是一個客服 AI 助理，協助客服人員更快回覆，可在 Zendesk 上使用。

highlight.en: It gives agents AI superpowers — multilingual understanding, knowledge-base lookup, one-click ticket summaries and weekly support reports.
highlight.zh: 它賦予客服人員 AI 超能力——多語言理解、知識庫查詢、一鍵工單摘要與每週客服報告。

summary.en: Veera Health treats women with Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) in India via a subscription app.
summary.zh: Veera Health 透過訂閱制 App，在印度治療患有多囊性卵巢症候群（PCOS）的女性。

highlight.en: Combining therapy with coaching and specialist support, its text reports 85% of patients feel 'in control' of their PCOS after one month.
highlight.zh: 結合治療與指導及專科支援，其文案指出 85% 的患者在一個月後感到能「掌控」自己的 PCOS。

summary.en: Launcher Labs made consumer crypto apps including Launchcaster, Frameboard and Maindrop.
summary.zh: Launcher Labs 製作消費性加密貨幣 App，包括 Launchcaster、Frameboard 與 Maindrop。

highlight.en: Its Launchcaster, a leading community for launching crypto projects, was acquired by Orange DAO; Maindrop was pitched as a 'Venmo for NFTs.'
highlight.zh: 其 Launchcaster 是發布加密專案的領先社群，已被 Orange DAO 收購；Maindrop 則被定位為「NFT 版的 Venmo」。

summary.en: Seer helps retail salespeople create and send personalized shoppable lookbooks to their customers.
summary.zh: Seer 協助零售銷售人員製作並寄送個人化、可購物的造型書給顧客。

highlight.en: With the tagline 'sell beyond the store,' it lets salespeople send personalized shoppable lookbooks via email and SMS.
highlight.zh: 以「超越門市銷售」為標語，它讓銷售人員透過電子郵件與簡訊寄送個人化、可購物的造型書。

summary.en: ROGER is a faster, simpler eSignature tool for sending and signing contracts.
summary.zh: ROGER 是一個更快、更簡單的電子簽章工具，用於傳送與簽署合約。

highlight.en: Positioning itself as 'what Linear did to Jira,' it aims to fix the janky experience of existing eSignature tools.
highlight.zh: 它定位為「Linear 之於 Jira」般的存在，志在改善現有電子簽章工具卡頓難用的體驗。

summary.en: Rethoric is a LinkedIn content consultancy and scheduling platform for busy founders.
summary.zh: Rethoric 是一個給忙碌創辦人用的 LinkedIn 內容顧問與排程平台。

highlight.en: Used by companies like Checkr and ClickUp, it runs the entire content operation from strategy to publishing via LinkedIn and Slack.
highlight.zh: 獲 Checkr 與 ClickUp 等公司採用，它透過 LinkedIn 與 Slack 包辦從策略到發布的整個內容運作。

summary.en: Friz is an AI social media manager for brainstorming, creating, publishing and managing content.
summary.zh: Friz 是一個 AI 社群媒體管理工具，用於發想、製作、發布與管理內容。

highlight.en: It lets users brainstorm, create, publish and manage social media content and advertisements all from one tool.
highlight.zh: 它讓使用者用單一工具即可發想、製作、發布與管理社群媒體的內容與廣告。

summary.en: Avion School teaches Filipinos to become remote software engineers for global companies.
summary.zh: Avion School 教導菲律賓人成為服務全球企業的遠端軟體工程師。

highlight.en: An education company focused on training Filipinos to become software engineers working remotely for companies worldwide.
highlight.zh: 一家教育公司，專注於培訓菲律賓人成為為全球企業遠端工作的軟體工程師。

summary.en: MagicBell is a notification inbox that web and mobile apps can embed in their products in minutes.
summary.zh: MagicBell 是一個通知收件匣，網頁與行動 App 能在幾分鐘內嵌入自家產品。

highlight.en: It handles real-time delivery, web/mobile push, email notifications and preference management, sitting between a dev tool and productivity tool.
highlight.zh: 它處理即時傳遞、網頁／行動推播、電子郵件通知與偏好管理，定位於開發者工具與生產力工具之間。
